# Bill

Legislation referenced by roll call votes. Not a comprehensive bill database — populated from vote cross-references.

**GraphQL type:** `Bill` · **Connection:** `BillsConnection`

## Queries

| Query | Returns | Description |
|-------|---------|-------------|
| `allBills(filter, orderBy, first, last, before, after)` | `BillsConnection` | Paginated list with filtering and ordering |
| `billById(id: BigInt!)` | `Bill` | Look up by primary key |
| `billByBillId(billId: String!)` | `Bill` | Look up by unique `billId` |

## Fields

| Field | GraphQL Type | Notes |
|-------|-------------|-------|
| `id` | `BigInt` |  <span style={{background:'#1877f2',color:'#fff',borderRadius:'3px',padding:'1px 5px',fontSize:'0.7rem',fontWeight:600,whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}>PK</span> |
| `billId` | `String` | Canonical ID in the form [bill_type][number]-[congress], e.g. hr3590-111. <span style={{background:'#6c757d',color:'#fff',borderRadius:'3px',padding:'1px 5px',fontSize:'0.7rem',fontWeight:600,whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}>unique</span> <span style={{background:'#dc3545',color:'#fff',borderRadius:'3px',padding:'1px 5px',fontSize:'0.7rem',fontWeight:600,whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}>required</span> |
| `billType` | `String` |  <span style={{background:'#dc3545',color:'#fff',borderRadius:'3px',padding:'1px 5px',fontSize:'0.7rem',fontWeight:600,whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}>required</span>. One of: `hr`, `hres`, `hjres`, `hconres`, `s`, `sres`, `sjres`, `sconres` |
| `billNumber` | `Int` |  <span style={{background:'#dc3545',color:'#fff',borderRadius:'3px',padding:'1px 5px',fontSize:'0.7rem',fontWeight:600,whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}>required</span> |
| `congress` | `Int` |  <span style={{background:'#dc3545',color:'#fff',borderRadius:'3px',padding:'1px 5px',fontSize:'0.7rem',fontWeight:600,whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}>required</span> |
| `introducedAt` | `Date` |  |
| `officialTitle` | `String` |  |
| `shortTitle` | `String` |  |
| `popularTitle` | `String` |  |
| `status` | `String` | Current bill status code per the unitedstates/congress taxonomy (INTRODUCED, REFERRED, ENACTED:SIGNED, etc.). |
| `statusAt` | `Datetime` |  |
| `sponsorBioguideId` | `String` |  <span style={{background:'#198754',color:'#fff',borderRadius:'3px',padding:'1px 5px',fontSize:'0.7rem',fontWeight:600,whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}>FK</span> |
| `enactedAsLawType` | `String` |  |
| `enactedAsNumber` | `String` |  |
| `sourceUpdatedAt` | `Datetime` |  |
| `createdAt` | `Datetime` |  |
| `updatedAt` | `Datetime` |  |

## Relationships

### Belongs to

| Field | Returns | Via |
|-------|---------|-----|
| `legislatorBySponsorBioguideId` | `Legislator` *(nullable)* | `sponsorBioguideId` |

### Has many

| Field | Returns | Via |
|-------|---------|-----|
| `votesByRelatedBillId` | `VotesConnection` | `relatedBillId` |
| `billCosponsorsByBillId` | `BillCosponsorsConnection` | `billId` |
| `billCommitteesByBillId` | `BillCommitteesConnection` | `billId` |

## Example

```graphql
{
  allBills(
    filter: { congress: { equalTo: 119 }, billType: { equalTo: "hr" } }
    orderBy: INTRODUCED_AT_DESC
    first: 10
  ) {
    nodes {
      billId
      officialTitle
      shortTitle
      status
      introducedAt
    }
  }
}
```
